title: 小桔灯 (节选)
author: 冰心
content_zh: 我提着这灵巧的小桔灯，慢慢地在黑暗潮湿的山路上走着。这朦胧的桔红的光，实在照不了多远，但这小姑娘的镇定、勇敢、乐观的精神鼓舞了我，我似乎觉得眼前有无限光明！

expression_patterns.example: 这灵巧的小桔灯...我似乎觉得眼前有无限光明
expression_patterns.explanation_zh: 通过描写小桔灯来表达对小姑娘勇敢精神的感动，以小见大
expression_patterns.explanation_en: Using the small orange lamp to express admiration for the girl's courage — a small object reveals a big feeling
expression_patterns.practice_prompt_zh: 选一样你身边的小东西，用它来表达一种感情
expression_patterns.practice_prompt_en: Pick a small object near you and use it to express a feeling

expression_patterns.example: 黑暗潮湿的山路...朦胧的桔红的光
expression_patterns.explanation_zh: 用视觉和触觉的细节描写，让读者仿佛身临其境
expression_patterns.explanation_en: Using visual and tactile details — dark, damp path and hazy orange light — to put the reader in the scene
expression_patterns.practice_prompt_zh: 描述一个你去过的地方，用至少两种感官来写
expression_patterns.practice_prompt_en: Describe a place you've been using at least two senses

expression_patterns.example: 实在照不了多远，但...眼前有无限光明
expression_patterns.explanation_zh: 先说灯光照不远，再话锋一转，说感受到无限光明——小与大形成强烈反差
expression_patterns.explanation_en: First admitting the light doesn't reach far, then turning to say she felt infinite brightness — a powerful contrast between small and large
expression_patterns.practice_prompt_zh: 用'虽然……但是……'写一个转折句，表达意想不到的感受
expression_patterns.practice_prompt_en: Write a turning-point sentence using 'although... but...' to express an unexpected feeling

title: 白鹅 (节选)
author: 丰子恺

source.edition: 人教版四年级下册课文版本

content_zh: 鹅的步态，更是傲慢了。大体上与鸭相似，但鸭的步调急速，有局促不安之相；鹅的步调从容，大模大样的，颇像京剧里的净角出场。

content_en.reference_pointer: Check 'A Feng Zikai Reader' (English edition) or 'The Chinese Essay' (Columbia University Press, ed. David Pollard)

expression_patterns.example: 傲慢
expression_patterns.explanation_zh: 用描写人的词语来形容鹅，好像鹅也有人的态度和脾气
expression_patterns.explanation_en: Using a human word ('arrogant') to describe the goose, as if it has a human personality
expression_patterns.practice_prompt_zh: 用一个描写人的词来形容你见过的一种动物
expression_patterns.practice_prompt_en: Use a word that normally describes people to describe an animal you've seen

expression_patterns.example: 鸭的步调急速，有局促不安之相；鹅的步调从容，大模大样的
expression_patterns.explanation_zh: 把鸭和鹅放在一起比较，一个急匆匆，一个慢悠悠，突出鹅的从容
expression_patterns.explanation_en: Comparing duck and goose side by side — one hurried, one stately — highlighting the goose's composure
expression_patterns.practice_prompt_zh: 选两种动物，用对比的方法描写它们的不同
expression_patterns.practice_prompt_en: Pick two animals and use contrast to describe how they differ

expression_patterns.example: 颇像京剧里的净角出场
expression_patterns.explanation_zh: 把鹅走路的样子比作京剧演员出场，画面感很强
expression_patterns.explanation_en: Comparing the goose's walk to a Beijing opera character entering the stage — creates a vivid image
expression_patterns.practice_prompt_zh: 用'像……'来形容一种动物做某件事的样子
expression_patterns.practice_prompt_en: Use 'like...' to describe how an animal does something

title: 夹竹桃 (节选)
author: 季羡林
content_zh: 但是夹竹桃的妙处还不止于此。我特别喜欢月光下的夹竹桃。你站在它下面，花朵是一团模糊；但是香气却毫不含糊，浓浓烈烈地从花枝上袭了下来。

content_en.reference_pointer: Check Foreign Languages Press / Panda Books Chinese prose anthologies; Ji Xianlin in English: 'The Cowshed' (Chenxin Jiang, NYRB, 2016)

expression_patterns.example: 花朵是一团模糊；但是香气却毫不含糊
expression_patterns.explanation_zh: 先说花看不清楚，再一转说香气却非常强烈——视觉模糊和嗅觉清晰形成反差
expression_patterns.explanation_en: First saying the flowers are blurred, then turning to say the fragrance is unmistakable — contrast between blurred sight and vivid smell
expression_patterns.practice_prompt_zh: 用转折写一样东西：先说它某方面不好，再说它另一方面特别好
expression_patterns.practice_prompt_en: Write about something using a turning point: first mention a weakness, then reveal a strength

expression_patterns.example: 花朵是一团模糊...香气却毫不含糊，浓浓烈烈地从花枝上袭了下来
expression_patterns.explanation_zh: 同时用视觉（模糊的花）和嗅觉（浓烈的香气）来写，让人仿佛站在花下
expression_patterns.explanation_en: Using both sight (blurred flowers) and smell (intense fragrance) together, making the reader feel they're standing under the tree
expression_patterns.practice_prompt_zh: 描述一种花或水果，同时写出它的样子和气味
expression_patterns.practice_prompt_en: Describe a flower or fruit using both what it looks like and what it smells like

expression_patterns.example: 浓浓烈烈
expression_patterns.explanation_zh: 把'浓烈'变成'浓浓烈烈'，感觉香气更强烈、更有力量
expression_patterns.explanation_en: Expanding '浓烈' into '浓浓烈烈' makes the fragrance feel even more intense and powerful
expression_patterns.practice_prompt_zh: 把一个两字词变成叠词（AABB），用来描述你闻到的或尝到的东西
expression_patterns.practice_prompt_en: Turn a two-character word into AABB reduplication to describe something you smelled or tasted

title: 从百草园到三味书屋 (节选)
author: 鲁迅
content_zh: 不必说碧绿的菜畦，光滑的石井栏，高大的皂荚树，紫红的桑椹；也不必说鸣蝉在树叶里长吟，肥胖的黄蜂伏在菜花上，轻捷的叫天子忽然从草间直窜向云霄里去了。

content_en.reference_pointer: See 'Dawn Blossoms Plucked at Dusk', Foreign Languages Press, 1976; or bilingual Echo of Classics edition, 2001 (ISBN 7119026976)

expression_patterns.example: 碧绿的菜畦，光滑的石井栏，高大的皂荚树，紫红的桑椹
expression_patterns.explanation_zh: 一连串列出花园里的好东西，让读者觉得花园里处处是宝
expression_patterns.explanation_en: Listing garden elements one after another, making the reader feel the garden is full of treasures
expression_patterns.practice_prompt_zh: 用列举的方法描述你最喜欢的一个地方里有什么
expression_patterns.practice_prompt_en: Use listing to describe what's in your favorite place

expression_patterns.example: 不必说...也不必说...
expression_patterns.explanation_zh: 两个'不必说'结构一样，形成递进，好像在说：这些都不算什么，还有更好的呢
expression_patterns.explanation_en: Two parallel 'no need to mention' clauses build momentum, as if saying: these are nothing, there's even better
expression_patterns.practice_prompt_zh: 用'不必说……也不必说……'写一段话，描述你喜欢的地方
expression_patterns.practice_prompt_en: Use 'no need to mention... no need to mention...' to describe a place you like

expression_patterns.example: 碧绿的...光滑的...紫红的...鸣蝉...长吟
expression_patterns.explanation_zh: 用颜色（碧绿、紫红）、触感（光滑）、声音（鸣蝉长吟）多种感官来写，让人身临其境
expression_patterns.explanation_en: Using color (green, purple-red), texture (smooth), and sound (cicadas singing) to immerse the reader
expression_patterns.practice_prompt_zh: 描述你的学校或家，用至少三种感官来写
expression_patterns.practice_prompt_en: Describe your school or home using at least three senses

title: 小王子 (节选)
author: Antoine de Saint-Exupery
content_zh: 如果你驯服了我，我们就会彼此需要。你对我来说是世界上独一无二的。我对你来说也是世界上独一无二的。

content_en.text: If you tame me, then we shall need each other. To me, you will be unique in all the world. To you, I shall be unique in all the world.

expression_patterns.example: 世界上独一无二的
expression_patterns.explanation_zh: 重复使用'独一无二'这个说法，强调了彼此的特别和珍贵
expression_patterns.explanation_en: Repeating 'unique in all the world' emphasizes how special and precious the bond is
expression_patterns.practice_prompt_zh: 用反复的手法写一段话，表达一个对你来说很重要的东西
expression_patterns.practice_prompt_en: Use repetition to write about something important to you

expression_patterns.example: 你对我来说……我对你来说……
expression_patterns.explanation_zh: 两个句子结构一样但角色互换，表现了关系是双向的、平等的
expression_patterns.explanation_en: Two sentences with the same structure but swapped roles, showing the relationship goes both ways equally
expression_patterns.practice_prompt_zh: 用排比的手法写两个对称的句子，描述你和好朋友的关系
expression_patterns.practice_prompt_en: Use parallelism to write two symmetrical sentences about you and a good friend

title: 爬山虎的脚 (节选)
author: 叶圣陶

source.edition: 部编版四年级课文版本

content_zh: 那些叶子绿得那么新鲜，看着非常舒服。叶尖一顺儿朝下，在墙上铺得那么均匀，没有重叠起来的，也不留一点儿空隙。一阵风拂过，一墙的叶子就漾起波纹，好看得很。

content_en.reference_pointer: Check 'A Ye Shengtao Reader' (Zhang Bojun, China Intercontinental Press, 2013) or 'The Chinese Essay' (Columbia University Press, ed. David Pollard, 2000)

expression_patterns.example: 叶尖一顺儿朝下，在墙上铺得那么均匀，没有重叠起来的，也不留一点儿空隙
expression_patterns.explanation_zh: 仔细观察叶子的方向、排列、间距，抓住小细节写得特别具体
expression_patterns.explanation_en: Carefully observing the direction, arrangement, and spacing of leaves — capturing tiny details with extraordinary precision
expression_patterns.practice_prompt_zh: 仔细看一片叶子或一朵花，用细节描写把你看到的写下来
expression_patterns.practice_prompt_en: Look closely at a leaf or flower and write down what you see using detail focus

title: 春 (节选)
author: 朱自清
content_zh: 小草偷偷地从土里钻出来，嫩嫩的，绿绿的。园子里，田野里，瞧去，一大片一大片满是的。坐着，躺着，打两个滚，踢几脚球，赛几趟跑，捉几回迷藏。风轻悄悄的，草软绵绵的。

content_en.reference_pointer: See 'Selected Essays of Zhu Ziqing', Panda Books edition, Chapter 2

expression_patterns.example: 小草偷偷地从土里钻出来
expression_patterns.explanation_zh: 把小草当作人来写，好像它会偷偷做事——让大自然变得活泼有趣
expression_patterns.explanation_en: Giving grass human behavior (sneaking out) — makes nature feel alive and playful
expression_patterns.practice_prompt_zh: 用拟人的手法描述一种你喜欢的动物或植物
expression_patterns.practice_prompt_en: Use personification to describe an animal or plant you like

expression_patterns.example: 嫩嫩的，绿绿的
expression_patterns.explanation_zh: 把字重复一遍，感觉更柔和、更生动，比单独说'嫩'或'绿'好听
expression_patterns.explanation_en: Repeating the character intensifies the feeling — softer and more vivid than just saying it once
expression_patterns.practice_prompt_zh: 用叠词描述你今天看到的一样东西
expression_patterns.practice_prompt_en: Use reduplication to describe something you saw today

title: 猫 (节选)
author: 老舍

source.edition: 部编版四年级下册课文版本

content_zh: 猫的性格实在有些古怪。说它老实吧，它的确有时候很乖。它会找个暖和的地方，成天睡大觉，无忧无虑，什么事也不过问。可是，它决定要出去玩玩，就会出走一天一夜，任凭谁怎么呼唤，它也不肯回来。

content_en.reference_pointer: No published English translation of this 1959 prose essay found. Check academic anthologies of modern Chinese prose or textbook companion materials.

expression_patterns.example: 无忧无虑，什么事也不过问
expression_patterns.explanation_zh: 用描写人的词来写猫，好像猫也会故意偷懒、不管事
expression_patterns.explanation_en: Using human attitudes ('carefree', 'doesn't bother with anything') to describe the cat, as if it deliberately chooses to be lazy
expression_patterns.practice_prompt_zh: 用拟人的手法写一写你家的宠物或你见过的小动物
expression_patterns.practice_prompt_en: Use personification to describe a pet or animal you've seen

expression_patterns.example: 说它老实吧...可是，它决定要出去玩玩
expression_patterns.explanation_zh: 先说猫很乖，再话锋一转说它会离家出走——两面性格形成反差
expression_patterns.explanation_en: First saying the cat is obedient, then turning with 'but' to reveal it runs away — the two sides of its personality create a vivid contrast
expression_patterns.practice_prompt_zh: 用'……可是……'写一个人或动物性格的两面
expression_patterns.practice_prompt_en: Use '...but...' to describe two sides of a person's or animal's personality

title: 桃花心木 (节选)
author: 林清玄

source.edition: 人教版六年级下册课文版本

content_zh: 不只是树，人也是一样，在不确定中生活的人，能比较经得起生活的考验，会锻炼出一颗独立自主的心。在不确定中，就能学会把很少的养分转化为巨大的能量，努力生长。

content_en.reference_pointer: Check The Chinese Pen (Taipei) back issues for possible published translation. No confirmed English version found.

expression_patterns.example: 不只是树，人也是一样
expression_patterns.explanation_zh: 前面一直在写树，现在突然说人也一样——用树的故事来讲做人的道理
expression_patterns.explanation_en: After talking about trees the whole time, suddenly saying people are the same — using a tree's story to teach a life lesson
expression_patterns.practice_prompt_zh: 选一种植物，先描写它怎么生长，再说说人可以从它身上学到什么
expression_patterns.practice_prompt_en: Pick a plant, describe how it grows, then say what people can learn from it

expression_patterns.example: 不只是树，人也是一样
expression_patterns.explanation_zh: 话题从树转到人，一句话就把整篇文章的意思升华了
expression_patterns.explanation_en: The topic pivots from trees to people — one sentence elevates the whole essay's meaning
expression_patterns.practice_prompt_zh: 写一段话先说一样东西，再用'不只是……也是……'转到另一个话题
expression_patterns.practice_prompt_en: Write about one thing, then use 'not just...also...' to pivot to a deeper topic

expression_patterns.example: 很少的养分转化为巨大的能量
expression_patterns.explanation_zh: '很少'和'巨大'放在一起，形成强烈对比，说明逆境能激发潜力
expression_patterns.explanation_en: 'Very little' and 'enormous' placed side by side create a sharp contrast, showing that adversity can unlock potential
expression_patterns.practice_prompt_zh: 用对比写一个句子，把小的东西和大的东西放在一起
expression_patterns.practice_prompt_en: Write a sentence using contrast, putting something small next to something big

title: 边城 (节选)
author: 沈从文
content_zh: 小溪流下去，绕山岨流，约三里便汇入茶峒的大河。人若过溪越小山走去，则只一里路就到了茶峒城边。溪流如弓背，山路如弓弦，故远近有了小小差异。

content_en.reference_pointer: See 'Border Town: A Novel' (Harper Perennial, 2009, ISBN 978-0-06-143691-8), Chapter 1

expression_patterns.example: 溪流如弓背，山路如弓弦
expression_patterns.explanation_zh: 把弯弯的溪流比作弓背，把直直的山路比作弓弦——一弯一直，画面一下子就清楚了
expression_patterns.explanation_en: Comparing the curving stream to a bow's back and the straight mountain path to its string — one curved, one straight, instantly clear
expression_patterns.practice_prompt_zh: 找一样弯的东西和一样直的东西，用比喻把它们联系起来
expression_patterns.practice_prompt_en: Find something curved and something straight, and use a simile to connect them

expression_patterns.example: 小溪流下去，绕山岨流，约三里便汇入茶峒的大河
expression_patterns.explanation_zh: 用地理位置和距离来描写环境，让读者像看地图一样了解这个地方
expression_patterns.explanation_en: Using geography and distances to paint the setting, so the reader can picture the place like looking at a map
expression_patterns.practice_prompt_zh: 描述你家附近的一条路或一条河，写出它经过哪些地方
expression_patterns.practice_prompt_en: Describe a road or river near your home, writing where it goes

title: 昆明的雨 (节选)
author: 汪曾祺
content_zh: 昆明的雨季是明亮的、丰满的，使人动情的。城春草木深，孟夏草木长。昆明的雨季，是浓绿的。

content_en.reference_pointer: See 'The Chinese Essay in the 20th Century' (Bochum University Press, 2000), pp. 138-141, ISBN 3934453147

expression_patterns.example: 明亮的、丰满的，使人动情的
expression_patterns.explanation_zh: 连续用三个词来形容雨季，一个比一个深入——从眼睛看到的，到身体感受的，再到心里的
expression_patterns.explanation_en: Three qualities in escalating sequence — from visual brightness, to physical fullness, to emotional stirring
expression_patterns.practice_prompt_zh: 用三个词来形容你最喜欢的季节，一个比一个深入
expression_patterns.practice_prompt_en: Describe your favorite season with three words, each going deeper

expression_patterns.example: 昆明的雨季，是浓绿的。
expression_patterns.explanation_zh: 最后一句特别短，像盖章一样，把整段的意思浓缩成一个颜色
expression_patterns.explanation_en: The final sentence is deliberately brief — stamping the whole passage with a single vivid color
expression_patterns.practice_prompt_zh: 先写两句长句描述一个地方，再用一句特别短的句子总结
expression_patterns.practice_prompt_en: Write two longer sentences describing a place, then sum it up with one very short sentence

title: 呼兰河传 (节选)
author: 萧红

source.edition: 部编版五年级课文版本

content_zh: 花开了，就像花睡醒了似的。鸟飞了，就像鸟上天了似的。虫子叫了，就像虫子在说话似的。一切都活了。都有无限的本领，要做什么，就做什么。要怎么样，就怎么样。都是自由的。

content_en.reference_pointer: See 'Tales of Hulan River' (Cheng & Tsui, 2002, ISBN 978-0-887273-92-6), Chapter 3

expression_patterns.example: 花开了，就像...鸟飞了，就像...虫子叫了，就像...
expression_patterns.explanation_zh: 三个句子结构完全一样，一个接一个，像波浪一样推过来，越读越有劲
expression_patterns.explanation_en: Three identically structured sentences roll in one after another like waves, building momentum with each repetition
expression_patterns.practice_prompt_zh: 用'……了，就像……似的'写三个排比句，描述春天的变化
expression_patterns.practice_prompt_en: Write three parallel sentences using '...just like...' to describe changes in spring

expression_patterns.example: 花睡醒了...虫子在说话
expression_patterns.explanation_zh: 花会睡觉，虫子会说话——用小孩子的眼光看世界，一切都是活的
expression_patterns.explanation_en: Flowers sleeping, bugs talking — seeing the world through a child's eyes, where everything is alive
expression_patterns.practice_prompt_zh: 假装你是一个小小孩，用拟人的方法描述花园里的三样东西
expression_patterns.practice_prompt_en: Pretend you're a little kid and use personification to describe three things in a garden
